classes.label: Campus
classes.description: A campus of a school, with contact details and a responsible person.

classes.label: Class
classes.description: A class within a school, identified by a school-assigned code and name.

classes.label: Student
classes.description: A student, identified by a school-assigned student number.

classes.label: Student Status Change
classes.description: A record of a change in a student's status, such as a transfer or withdrawal.

datatype_properties.label: Campus Contact Phone
datatype_properties.description: The contact phone number for the campus.

datatype_properties.label: Campus Fax Phone
datatype_properties.description: The fax phone number for the campus.

datatype_properties.label: Campus Head ID
datatype_properties.description: The employee ID of the person responsible for the campus.

datatype_properties.label: Class Code
datatype_properties.description: The school-assigned code for the class.

datatype_properties.label: Class Name
datatype_properties.description: The school-assigned name for the class.

datatype_properties.label: Class Establishment Date
datatype_properties.description: The year and month the class was established.

datatype_properties.label: Class Grade
datatype_properties.description: The grade level of the class.

datatype_properties.label: Class Teacher ID
datatype_properties.description: The employee ID of the class teacher.

datatype_properties.label: Class Monitor Student ID
datatype_properties.description: The student ID of the class monitor.

datatype_properties.label: Student ID
datatype_properties.description: The school-assigned student number.

datatype_properties.label: Previous School Name
datatype_properties.description: The name of the school the student attended before enrollment.

datatype_properties.label: Previous Student ID
datatype_properties.description: The student's ID at their previous school.

datatype_properties.label: Enrollment Method Code
datatype_properties.description: A code representing the method of enrollment.

datatype_properties.label: Source Region Code
datatype_properties.description: A code representing the student's region of origin.

datatype_properties.label: Student Source Code
datatype_properties.description: A code representing the source of the student.

datatype_properties.label: Study Mode Code
datatype_properties.description: A code representing the student's mode of study.

datatype_properties.label: Enrollment Date
datatype_properties.description: The year and month the student enrolled.

datatype_properties.label: Student Category Code
datatype_properties.description: A code representing the category of the student.

datatype_properties.label: Current Class Code
datatype_properties.description: The code of the class the student is currently in.

datatype_properties.label: Current Grade
datatype_properties.description: The current grade level of the student.

datatype_properties.label: Current Status Code
datatype_properties.description: A code representing the student's current status.

datatype_properties.label: Change Category Code
datatype_properties.description: A code representing the category of the status change.

datatype_properties.label: Change Date
datatype_properties.description: The date of the status change.

datatype_properties.label: Change Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: A code representing the reason for the status change.

datatype_properties.label: Approval Date
datatype_properties.description: The date the status change was approved.

datatype_properties.label: Approval Document Number
datatype_properties.description: The official document number for the approval.

datatype_properties.label: Source School Code
datatype_properties.description: The code of the school the student is coming from.

datatype_properties.label: Destination School Code
datatype_properties.description: The code of the school the student is going to.

datatype_properties.label: Change Description
datatype_properties.description: A description of the status change.

datatype_properties.label: Previous Department Code
datatype_properties.description: The code of the student's previous department.

object_properties.label: has Head
object_properties.description: The person responsible for the campus.

object_properties.label: has Teacher
object_properties.description: The teacher responsible for the class.

object_properties.label: has Monitor
object_properties.description: The student who is the monitor of the class.

object_properties.label: enrolled In
object_properties.description: The class the student is currently enrolled in.

object_properties.label: has Status Change
object_properties.description: A record of a change in the student's status.
